memoryArtifacts.headline: Roger & Alice de MOWBRAY
memoryArtifacts.description:
ROGER de MOWBRAY (GUILLAUME 1, ROGER 2, NIGEL 3)

m. ALICE de GAND (m.1. Ilbert de Lacy), d. of Walter de Gand and Matilda de Bretagne
d.1188 Tyre

The Pipe Roll for 1130 lists Roger de Molbrai in Yor …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbray於1119年出生在英國越可爾馬斯哈姆時，他的父親Nigel D'Aubigny48歲，母親Gundred de Gournay22歲。他和Alice De Gant至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他於1138年登記服兵役。他去世於1188年在巴勒斯坦享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.description: Ayyubid dynasty. Saladin overthrows the Fatimid ruler and becomes the sultan of Egypt.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbray was born in 1119, in Masham, Yorkshire, England, his father, Nigel D'Aubigny, was 48 and his mother, Gundred de Gournay, was 22. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Alice De Gant. He registered for military service in 1138. He died in 1188, in Palestine, at the age of 69, and was buried in York, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbray est né en 1119, à Masham, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Nigel D'Aubigny, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Gundred de Gournay, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Alice De Gant. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1138. Il est décédé en 1188, à Palestine, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à York, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbray 1119 in Masham, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nigel D'Aubigny 48 und seine Mutter Gundred de Gournay 22. Er hatte mit Alice De Gant mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1138 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1188 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Palästina und wurde in York, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbray è nato il nel 1119 nel Masham, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Nigel D'Aubigny, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Gundred de Gournay, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Alice De Gant. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1138. Morì nel 1188, nel Palestina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a York, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbrayが1119年にイギリスヨークシュアイアマシャムで生まれた時，父Nigel D'Aubignyは48歳，母Gundred de Gournayは22歳であった。彼はAlice De Gantとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1138年に兵役登録をした。彼は1188年にパレスチナで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.Waxholme, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 와스홀
ko.lifeSummary: Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbray(이)가 1119년 영국 요르크실르 마샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nigel D'Aubigny(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Gundred de Gournay(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Alice De Gant(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1138년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1188년 팔레스타인에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbray nasceu em 1119, em Masham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nigel D'Aubigny, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Gundred de Gournay, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Alice De Gant. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1138. Ele faleceu em 1188, em Palestina, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em York, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Waxholme, Yorkshire, England: ваксхолм, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger D'Aubigny Lord Of Montbray родился в 1119 г. в местности машам, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nigel D'Aubigny было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Gundred de Gournay, 22. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Alice De Gant. В 1138 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1188 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности ерк, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Alice De Gant. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1138.
